title: Arcent ERC-8183 Safety E2E — reject auto-refunds escrow
refundMechanism: reject() auto-refunds — no separate claimRefund needed for Rejected state
claimRefundForRejected: reverts (0x8e78f0cb custom error) — by design, claimRefund is only for Expired state
note: EIP-8183 spec: 'claimRefund operation intentionally bypasses hooks to ensure guaranteed recovery path after expiry'. Reject handles refund internally.
bugsCaughtPrePush: getJob ABI was wrong (7 fields → 9 fields per EIP-8183 spec). job_status tool was silently returning error. Fixed.
claimRefund reverts on Rejected state — reject() auto-refunds. Tool description updated.
job_status tuple indices corrected (status was at index 3, actually at index 7).
